used_in_paper_for: Automated screwdriving anomaly detection dataset collection (AURSAD)

safety_modes.description: Safety state of the Universal Robots controller as reported via RTDE.

enum.name: NORMAL
enum.description: Robot is operating normally within configured safety limits.

enum.name: REDUCED
enum.description: Robot is operating in reduced mode with limited speed and/or force due to safety configuration or zone activation.

enum.name: PROTECTIVE_STOP
enum.description: Protective stop triggered due to collision detection, excessive force, or safety threshold violation. Requires operator reset.

enum.name: RECOVERY
enum.description: Robot is in recovery mode following a safety event and requires manual intervention.

enum.name: SAFEGUARD_STOP
enum.description: External safeguard device (e.g., light curtain, safety door, interlock) has triggered a stop.

enum.name: SYSTEM_EMERGENCY_STOP
enum.description: Emergency stop activated from the robot control box.

enum.name: ROBOT_EMERGENCY_STOP
enum.description: Emergency stop activated from the teach pendant or robot-mounted E-stop button.

enum.name: VIOLATION
enum.description: Configured safety limits (speed, position, joint limits, etc.) have been violated.

enum.name: FAULT
enum.description: Internal safety system fault detected. System requires troubleshooting before operation can resume.

enum.name: AUTOMATIC_MODE_SAFEGUARD_STOP
enum.description: Safeguard stop triggered while the robot is operating in automatic mode.

enum.name: SYSTEM_THREE_POSITION_ENABLING_STOP
enum.description: Stop triggered due to incorrect activation of the system three-position enabling device.

enum.name: TP_THREE_POSITION_ENABLING_STOP
enum.description: Stop triggered due to incorrect activation of the teach pendant three-position enabling device.

enum.name: IMMI_EMERGENCY_STOP
enum.description: Emergency stop triggered through an IMMI (external machinery interface) safety connection.

enum.name: IMMI_SAFEGUARD_STOP
enum.description: Safeguard stop triggered through an IMMI (external machinery interface) safety connection.

enum.name: PROFISAFE_WAITING_FOR_PARAMETERS
enum.description: Robot is waiting for safety parameters via PROFIsafe communication before operation can proceed.

enum.name: PROFISAFE_AUTOMATIC_MODE_SAFEGUARD_STOP
enum.description: Safeguard stop triggered via PROFIsafe while in automatic mode.

enum.name: PROFISAFE_SAFEGUARD_STOP
enum.description: Safeguard stop triggered through PROFIsafe safety communication.

enum.name: PROFISAFE_EMERGENCY_STOP
enum.description: Emergency stop triggered through PROFIsafe safety communication.

enum.name: SAFETY_API_SAFEGUARD_STOP
enum.description: Safeguard stop triggered via the Safety API interface.

joint_modes.description: Per-joint servo control state of each UR robot joint as reported via RTDE. One value is provided for each joint (0â€“5 on UR3e).

enum.name: RESET
enum.description: Joint is in reset state following a fault or shutdown event.

enum.name: SHUTTING_DOWN
enum.description: Joint controller is in the process of shutting down.

enum.name: BACKDRIVE
enum.description: Backdrive mode active; joint can be manually moved with reduced resistance.

enum.name: POWER_OFF
enum.description: Joint motor power is disabled.

enum.name: READY_FOR_POWER_OFF
enum.description: Joint is prepared for power-off but not yet fully powered down.

enum.name: NOT_RESPONDING
enum.description: Joint controller is not responding; communication failure or internal issue.

enum.name: MOTOR_INITIALISATION
enum.description: Joint motor is undergoing initialization sequence.

enum.name: BOOTING
enum.description: Joint controller is booting.

enum.name: BOOTLOADER
enum.description: Joint is in bootloader mode (firmware loading state).

enum.name: VIOLATION
enum.description: Joint safety or operational limits have been violated.

enum.name: FAULT
enum.description: Joint has encountered a fault condition and requires intervention.

enum.name: RUNNING
enum.description: Joint is operating normally under active control.

enum.name: IDLE
enum.description: Joint is powered and ready but not actively moving.

robot_modes.description: Overall operational state of the Universal Robots controller as reported via RTDE. This reflects the high-level lifecycle state of the robot arm and safety control system.

enum.name: DISCONNECTED
enum.description: Connection with the safety control board is not established.

enum.name: CONFIRM_SAFETY
enum.description: Robot is validating and updating safety settings before enabling operation.

enum.name: BOOTING
enum.description: Safety control board is booting and communication with other components is being verified.

enum.name: POWER_OFF
enum.description: Robot is powered but joints are not energized. Ready to boot up the joints.

enum.name: POWER_ON
enum.description: Robot joints are in the process of booting up and being energized.

enum.name: IDLE
enum.description: Robot joints are powered and ready, but not executing motion. Can transition to RUNNING or BACKDRIVE.

enum.name: BACKDRIVE
enum.description: Robot is in backdrive mode. Brakes are selectively released to allow restricted manual movement.

enum.name: RUNNING
enum.description: Brakes are fully released and robot is ready to execute or currently executing a program. Safety mode is active and displayed in PolyScope.

enum.name: UPDATING
enum.description: Controller firmware is being updated.

enum.name: POWERING_OFF
enum.description: Robot arm is in the process of powering down.

enum.name: ARM_BOOTING
enum.description: Robot arm hardware is booting up.

enum.name: ARM_UPDATING
enum.description: Robot arm firmware is being updated.

runtime_states.description: Program execution state of the KUKA KRC4/KRC5 controller ROBOT interpreter as reported via the robot data interface ($PRO_STATE1).

enum.name: P_FREE
enum.description: No program selected; program memory is free.

enum.name: P_RESET
enum.description: Program is loaded and in reset state; initialised but not yet started.

enum.name: P_ACTIVE
enum.description: Program is actively running.

enum.name: P_STOP
enum.description: Program execution is stopped (paused); resumable without reset.

enum.name: P_END
enum.description: Program execution has reached the end; robot is stationary.
